description: Rollback manifest for JARVIS production deployments. Use this to identify stable targets when a deploy breaks.

stable_commits.message: Production runtime stabilization + IBKR bridge hardening

patches_included: Duplicate const brokers fix in loadCockpit()
known_issues: IBKR bridge hardening not yet applied

stable_commits.message: JARVIS final runtime stabilization + premium UX recovery
known_issues: IBKR bridge hardening not yet applied

rollback_procedure.step_1: Identify which commit introduced the regression (git bisect or deploy history)
rollback_procedure.step_2: Find the last stable commit in stable_commits above
rollback_procedure.step_4: Or: git revert <bad_commit_hash> to create a safe revert commit
rollback_procedure.step_5: Run deployment_guard.py on the reverted state
rollback_procedure.caution: Never force-push to main. Use git revert to preserve history.

primary_signals: Dashboard loads but shows infinite spinner
IBKR debug endpoint returns localhost URL
Portfolio cockpit shows SyntaxError in browser console
